title: Richly Roasted Slovakian Fideo Noodles
description: A hearty and energizing Slovakian dish featuring slow-cooked fideo noodles, this recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of caramelized onions and roasted vegetables creates a rich and jammy flavor profile.
instructions: Cook the fideo noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until caramelized.
Add the chopped carrots and celery to the skillet and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked fideo noodles, roasted vegetables, and spices.
Toss the mixture to combine and transfer to a baking dish.
Roast the mixture in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the dish from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
